# Galeo Beauty

Galeo Beauty is a beauty salon and advanced aesthetics destination in Landsmeer, Hartbeespoort, South Africa.
The salon offers hair, hair extensions, nails, lashes and brows, facials, massage, waxing, IPL hair removal, permanent makeup, injectables, body contouring, tanning, and selected clinical skin treatments.
Clients often visit from Hartbeespoort, Pretoria, Centurion, Johannesburg, and nearby estates around Hartbeespoort Dam.

## Core Business Facts

- Business name: Galeo Beauty
- Website: https://www.galeobeauty.com/
- Location: Shop 6, Landsmeer, Jan Smuts Rd, Hartbeespoort, 0216, North West, South Africa
- Phone: +27 12 111 1730
- Email: info@galeobeauty.com
- Primary booking and service information: https://www.galeobeauty.com/services

## Key Pages

- Home: https://www.galeobeauty.com/
- Services overview: https://www.galeobeauty.com/services
- Contact and directions: https://www.galeobeauty.com/contact

- Beauty blog and treatment guides: https://www.galeobeauty.com/blog
- Specials: https://www.galeobeauty.com/specials
- Gallery: https://www.galeobeauty.com/gallery
